title: BasemindConfigV1
description: Configuration for the basemind file-watcher and code-map generator.

$schema.description: URL or short tag identifying the config schema version. Must match one of the known versions.

include.description: Glob patterns (relative to repo root) of files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude. Applied after include.

respect_gitignore.description: Honor .gitignore files when walking the tree.

max_file_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this. Prevents minified-bundle stalls.

skip_submodules.description: Skip paths under any submodule root listed in .gitmodules. Set false to fold submodule sources into the parent's index.

eager_l2.description: Run L2 extraction (calls + docs) inline with L1. Required for `find_references` to return non-empty results. Disable to halve scan time on large repos when reference search isn't needed.

debounce_ms.description: Coalesce file events within this window.

live_l2.description: Eagerly compute L2 (docs + call graph) on every change instead of on-demand.

file_map_lru.description: Maximum number of extracted FileMaps to keep hot in memory.

transport.description: MCP transport. Only stdio is wired in v1.

languages.description: Per-language overrides keyed by language name (matches tree-sitter-language-pack identifiers).

enabled.description: Disable extraction for this language without removing it from scan globs.

documents.description: Document tier (PDFs, Office docs, emails, images via OCR). Only honored when basemind is built with the `documents` cargo feature.

enabled.description: Master switch for the document tier.

mime_allowlist.description: Restrict document ingestion to these IANA MIME types. Empty = accept anything kreuzberg can handle.

overlap.description: Overlap between adjacent chunks in characters.

embedding_preset.description: Kreuzberg embedding preset name (controls model + dim).

embed.description: Generate embeddings for each chunk and write to LanceDB. Disable to skip vector storage entirely.

memory.description: Shared agent memory tools. Only honored when basemind is built with the `memory` cargo feature.

enabled.description: Master switch for the memory tier.

scope_strategy.description: How to derive the scope key. `git_remote_with_fallback` uses the normalised origin remote URL when present, else the workdir realpath. `workdir_only` always uses the workdir.

crawl.description: On-demand web crawling via kreuzcrawl. Only honored when basemind is built with the `crawl` cargo feature.

respect_robots_txt.description: Honour robots.txt for every fetched URL. Flip off only for hosts you control.

max_pages.description: Hard cap on pages visited in a single web_crawl call.

max_depth.description: Maximum link-following depth from the seed URL during web_crawl.

max_body_size.description: Truncate response bodies above this many bytes before parsing.

user_agent.description: User-Agent header sent with every request.
